surfaces.description: npm run circuit:run entrypoint (`dogfood-run-0` dry-run invocation)
surfaces.expected_evidence: package.json scripts.circuit:run is a non-placeholder shell command (not echo/true/noop)
.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists, parses as object, declares non-empty name and version

surfaces.description: dogfood-run-0 workflow fixture loaded by `npm run circuit:run -- dogfood-run-0`
surfaces.expected_evidence: .claude-plugin/skills/dogfood-run-0/circuit.json parses as a non-empty JSON object

surfaces.description: src/runtime/ module hosting the runner entrypoint(s)
surfaces.expected_evidence: src/runtime/ contains at least one .ts file with an `export` and >=40 non-comment non-whitespace characters
specs/artifacts.json has a row whose id matches /event.?writer/ AND its schema_file or repo-local backing_paths resolve to a non-empty file
surfaces.evidence_summary: no specs/artifacts.json row matches /event.?writer/ for event writer

surfaces.expected_evidence: specs/artifacts.json has a row whose id matches /snapshot.?writer/ AND its schema_file or repo-local backing_paths resolve to a non-empty file
surfaces.evidence_summary: no specs/artifacts.json row matches /snapshot.?writer/ for snapshot writer

surfaces.expected_evidence: specs/artifacts.json has a row whose id matches /manifest.?snapshot/ AND its schema_file resolves to a non-empty file
surfaces.evidence_summary: no specs/artifacts.json row matches /manifest.?snapshot/ for manifest snapshot

surfaces.description: Runner smoke test exercising at least one dogfood step end-to-end
surfaces.expected_evidence: A tests/ file whose path matches /tests\/runner\/.*smoke\.test\.ts$/ or /tests\/.*runner[-_]smoke\.test\.ts$/ and contains an it/test/describe block

surfaces.description: events.ndjson append → parse → reduce → derive state.json round-trip test
surfaces.expected_evidence: A tests/ file whose filename matches /event[-_]?log[-_]?round[-_]?trip\.test\.ts$/ and contains an it/test/describe block

surfaces.description: README.md / PROJECT_STATE.md / TIER.md current_slice markers present and in agreement
surfaces.expected_evidence: All three files carry a well-formed <!-- current_slice: <id> --> marker in the status-header zone, and the ids agree
